title: MyCR 全量报告 20260704-090414
overview:
本轮先在 MyCR 仓库执行 `git pull --ff-only`，结果为 already up to date；随后对 trpc-group/trpc-agent-go 做显式全量 sweep。由于 incremental planner 在传入上一轮 run_state 时仍产生 carry-forward，本轮按全量语义重新生成 46/46 heavy_review 计划。

实际完成动作：#2082、#1894、#2017 均已 `LGTM` 并 squash merge；#2080 已 `LGTM`，但 `codecov/patch` 仍失败，所以按 MyCR 规则只审批、不合并。最终开放 PR 从 46 个降到 43 个。

#2049 和 #1526 虽然 CI 绿，但当前 head 仍有 CodeRabbit actionable comments；#1930 是跨模型默认 timeout 的行为变更；#2045/#2050/#2044 及 replay/dynamicworkflow 类大 PR 需要 maintainer/manual_review 选择或继续处理，因此本轮没有强行 LGTM。

目标仓库本身存在用户已有脏工作区，本轮所有本地验证均在 `.mycr-runs/20260704-084033/worktrees/` 临时 worktree 中完成，未改动目标 checkout 的既有变更。

approved.title: fix(flow/processor): cancel parallel tool siblings on critical failure
approved.author: sks
approved.ci_state: GitHub checks all green including codecov/patch; head f805880d6c15453a78a65a0955b3a5cf0705ad8a was matched before merge.
approved.technical_background: Parallel flow tool calls should cancel sibling calls only when a critical non-ignorable error occurs, while panics and ignorable errors stay isolated.
approved.problem: A critical failure inside one parallel tool call could leave siblings running instead of cancelling them promptly.
approved.necessity_assessment: necessary: linked issue #2081 and local code path show cancellation semantics needed for parallel execution correctness.
approved.evidence_checked: Reviewed functioncall errgroup/context changes, panic handling, collectParallelToolResults behavior, linked issue context, current checks, and CodeRabbit status.
approved.approach: Approve and squash merge after targeted race test and current-head check.
approved.review_action: gh pr review 2082 --approve --body LGTM; gh pr merge 2082 --squash --match-head-commit f805880d6c15453a78a65a0955b3a5cf0705ad8a

approved.title: fix(model/gemini): inject skip validator for cross-provider function calls
approved.author: sks
approved.ci_state: All GitHub checks green; review decision changed from old CHANGES_REQUESTED to APPROVED after current-head LGTM; head c602dd565038a0da1640ba64139d97e739234bce matched before merge.
approved.technical_background: Gemini 3 rejects replayed function calls from non-Gemini providers when thought_signature is missing. The PR injects a documented bypass sentinel only for the first unsigned call in a replayed assistant step and rewrites the wire payload from base64 bytes to the literal token.
approved.problem: Cross-provider tool-call replay could fail with Gemini HTTP 400 for missing thought_signature.
approved.necessity_assessment: necessary: PR body includes the failure mode, tests cover signature preservation and literal wire serialization, and implementation is scoped to Gemini conversion.
approved.evidence_checked: Reviewed gemini conversion, bypass rewriter, client/request ExtrasRequestProvider chaining, current CodeRabbit status, and current checks.
approved.approach: Approve and squash merge after module-local targeted and race tests.
approved.modules: model/gemini message conversion, thought-signature bypass request rewriting, and tests.
approved.tests_docs: Root `go test ./model/gemini/...` is not valid for this multi-module checkout; equivalent module-local tests passed in `model/gemini`.
approved.review_action: gh pr review 1894 --approve --body LGTM; gh pr merge 1894 --squash --match-head-commit c602dd565038a0da1640ba64139d97e739234bce

approved.title: fix: use UPDATE instead of DELETE for soft delete in rotateMemory
approved.author: shanghai-Jerry
approved.ci_state: All checks green; old WineChord CHANGES_REQUESTED was superseded by current-head audit and LGTM; head 7681a9ffa11ae2a6af09c5c328cbeef754c3eb5c matched before merge.
approved.technical_background: mysqlvec rotateMemory must replace a memory row while preserving soft-delete semantics and avoiding duplicate-key errors when the target ID exists.
approved.problem: Soft-delete mode previously used hard DELETE, and the follow-up hard-delete duplicate-key path needed a target-row pre-check.
approved.necessity_assessment: necessary: current code adds target `FOR UPDATE` pre-check, rejects active target IDs, revives soft-deleted targets in soft-delete mode, and deletes soft-deleted targets before hard-delete insert.
approved.evidence_checked: Reviewed current diff after the previous blocker, hard-delete and soft-delete target handling, SQL mock expectations, current checks, and latest reviews.
approved.approach: Approve and squash merge after mysqlvec targeted and race tests.
approved.tests_docs: `go test . -run TestService_UpdateMemory|TestService_DeleteMemory|TestService_ClearMemories -count=1` and `go test . -race -count=1` passed in memory/mysqlvec module.
approved.review_action: gh pr review 2017 --approve --body LGTM; gh pr merge 2017 --squash --match-head-commit 7681a9ffa11ae2a6af09c5c328cbeef754c3eb5c

approved.title: internal/jsonrepair: add Loads API and wire opt-in SDK decode helpers
approved.author: sks
approved.ci_state: All checks green except `codecov/patch` FAILURE; GitHub reviewDecision is APPROVED after LGTM; mergeStateStatus remained blocked/unknown due required coverage gate.
approved.technical_background: The PR adds jsonrepair Loads APIs and opt-in flexible JSON decoding for tool-call arguments and related SDK decode paths.
approved.problem: Malformed JSON arguments need an opt-in repair path without weakening strict default behavior.
approved.necessity_assessment: useful and well-scoped, but not mergeable while codecov/patch is red.
approved.evidence_checked: Reviewed jsonrepair/jsonutils helpers, opt-in gating in tool/function and processor paths, CodeRabbit latest status, current checks, and Codecov missing-line report.
approved.approach: Submitted LGTM only; intentionally did not merge because codecov/patch is a hard merge gate.
approved.modules: internal/jsonrepair, internal/jsonutils, tool/function, internal/flow/processor, evaluation response decoder, tool submodule go.mod/go.sum updates.
attention_points: do not merge until coverage gate passes
approved.outcome: Approved; merge deferred by required codecov/patch failure.
